docs.title: I'm Miguel de Frias!
docs.text: I’m studying Software Engineering student at the University of Brasília (UnB). Passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and developing innovative solutions to real-world problems. With experience in .NET, C#, Python, Java, and a solid understanding of Databases and Software Testing. I’m always excited to learn, improve, and contribute to impactful projects.

docs.title: 💻 Professional Experience:
docs.text: Full-stack development for DNIT projects, utilizing .NET, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and other modern technologies.

docs.title: 🌱 Interests:
docs.text: Full-stack Development, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Databases, Software Testing, and Software Engineering.

docs.title: 🛠️ Technical Skills
docs.text: Programming Languages: Python, Java, C/C++, C#, TypeScript, JavaScript, Pascal, Assembly. Front-end: React, React Native, FlutterFlow, HTML, CSS, TailwindCSS. Back-end: .NET, SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL. Tools and Methodologies: Git, GitHub, Postman, Figma, Scrum. Other Skills: Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, and Computer Networks.

docs.title: 💼 Professional Experience
docs.text: Developer - UnB/DNIT (Mar 2023 - Jul 2023) Worked on full-stack application development for the National Department of Infrastructure and Transport (DNIT). Technologies used: .NET, C#, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Figma.
